baseline_family_v7_to_v11.summary: Weak positive edge exists in recalibrated v7, but guard, universe, weight penalty, extraction, and refresh-rule micro-tuning did not promote the family.
baseline_family_v7_to_v11.recommended_action: Keep recalibrated v7 as operational reference only; do not continue local micro-tuning.

quality_profitability_family_v12.summary: Signal is not fully random, but edge is very shallow and head extraction is poor; turnover and drawdown improved but return did not.
quality_profitability_family_v12.recommended_action: Do not continue family-level extraction tuning until stronger single-signal evidence exists.

price_volume_multisignal_family_v13.summary: Current fixed multisignal price/volume family shows negative edge and inverted decile direction.

trend_quality_price_volume_family_v14.summary: Cleaner trend-quality construction still shows negative edge and inverted decile behavior.

why: Recent mixed-family attempts either have very weak edge or negative score direction.
Directly opening another mixed score family would add research freedom without enough new information.
Single-signal screening can identify which atomic signals have genuine positive edge before recombining.
